title: LANE COUNTY FAMILY MEDIATION - 211info
text: LANE COUNTY MEDIATION & RESTORATIVE SERVICES LANE COUNTY FAMILY MEDIATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers court-required parenting class for separating and divorcing parents, a confidential mediation process in which parents meet with a professional, court-approved mediator to develop a parenting plan that is in the best interests of the children, a Family Check-Up program, supervised parenting, and custody evaluations. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: By appointment only Email (541) 682-4709 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 682-4709 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, email, or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm, appointment only Services: Court Ordered Parenting Programs Mediation * Divorce/Custody/Support Issues Parental Visitation Facilitation If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
